name: DeltaPress
changes: Comprehensive analytics system
User, behavior, article, and traffic analytics
Configurable proxy system (on-prem, CORS Anywhere, app proxy)
Removed Gemini as default - all AI providers user-configurable
Real-time analytics dashboard
User Analytics: Total, new, returning, active users (DAU/WAU/MAU)
User Analytics: IP geolocation with country/region/city mapping
User Analytics: Device type, OS, browser breakdown
User Analytics: User retention and churn rate
Behavior Analytics: Session duration, pages per session
Behavior Analytics: Scroll depth, click events, navigation paths
Behavior Analytics: Entry/exit pages, bounce rate
Article Analytics: Views, read time, completion rate
Article Analytics: Shares, likes, comments, saves
Article Analytics: Author and category performance
Traffic Analytics: Organic, direct, referral, social sources
Traffic Analytics: UTM campaign tracking
Proxy System: On-prem proxy support
Proxy System: CORS Anywhere proxy support
Proxy System: App built-in proxy (default)
Removed Gemini as default provider
All AI providers disabled by default - user must enable
Analytics API: 10 new endpoints for data retrieval
Real-time analytics with 5-minute window
Custom branding settings with site name and tagline
Site logo upload and URL configuration
Login page logo customization
Login page background color and image support
Custom header HTML injection
Header and footer scripts (analytics, tracking codes)
Primary, secondary, and accent color configuration
Custom CSS editor with live preview
Favicon customization
Branding API endpoints (GET, PUT, POST, RESET)
Logo upload API with base64 support
Database installation with PostgreSQL (default), MySQL, and MongoDB options
Automatic database table creation with schema initialization
Secure credential generation with unique passwords for app and database
Credentials saved to .credentials file (auto-added to .gitignore)
Docker container support for database deployment
Database connection string auto-configuration
Admin user auto-creation in database
JWT secret auto-generation for security
Rugged all-encompassing installer with progress bar
Real-time percentage display (0-100%)
Prerequisite checks before any installation
Retry logic with configurable attempts
Critical step detection with automatic halt on failure
Validation mode (-ValidateOnly) for testing
Comprehensive error messages with solutions
Installation log and report generation
FAQ documentation covering all common issues
Comprehensive PowerShell rollout script for Windows
Automatic Node.js installation via winget/Chocolatey/Scoop
Docker deployment with auto-install and container management
Host deployment with dependency management
Windows Service integration using NSSM
Environment configuration helper script
Real-time logging with color-coded status indicators
Error handling and recovery suggestions
Health checks and deployment reporting
Admin API Settings view for CORS/ENV/API visibility
RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) system implementation
API provider status dashboard with key count and cooldown status
Environment variable status with secret protection
Model configurations display in admin panel
Enhanced role permissions: Admin, Editor, Reviewer, User
CORS handling with configurable origin whitelisting
API rate limiting with per-provider configuration
Model-specific configurations for Gemini, Zhipu, AI/ML, Kimi
Automatic cooldown mechanism on rate limit errors
Enhanced retry logic with exponential backoff
PDF technical documentation
Round Robin API cycling implementation
Multi-key support per provider
Automatic fallback on provider failure
Statistics tracking for monitoring
Initial release
AI-assisted newsroom platform
Journalist agent orchestration
Supabase integration
